prompt: Create a hyper-detailed vertical fantasy fashion portrait of an ethereal young woman centered against a deep black studio background. She has porcelain skin, large pale blue eyes, soft glossy lips, and a calm, doll-like expression, looking directly at the viewer. Her short airy bob haircut is split into vivid pastel colors: cyan blue, cotton-candy pink, and pale lavender, with wispy strands floating outward. She wears an elaborate floral-and-wing headpiece with exactly 7 prominent large blossoms: 3 large white dahlia-like flowers across the top and left side, 2 pink roses on the right side, and 2 smaller white flowers near the lower left edge, plus delicate baby’s-breath-like sprigs, thorny black twigs, curled tendrils, and two translucent pale gray butterfly or fairy wings rising behind her head. Her outfit is a dramatic haute-couture black lace corset dress with a deep sweetheart neckline, sheer sleeves, a black lace choker collar, white petal appliqués, silver vein-like embroidery, and organic branch filigree spreading over her shoulders and chest. Surround her with exactly 5 prominent floating white flower accents around the frame: one near the upper left, one mid-left, one lower left, one near her right shoulder, and one near the lower right, mixed with fine black splatter-like botanical lines and drifting translucent petals. Use ultra-realistic anime-inspired fantasy photography, sharp facial detail, luminous skin, intricate lace texture, high contrast, soft directional light, shallow depth of field, and a surreal gothic fairy aesthetic. Vertical 9:16 composition, upper-body framing from head to waist, no text, no watermark.
